branch_metadata.branch_rationale: Lepton/quark mass or CP-mixing observable; vacuum-QFT-anchored

title: Continuum Bianchi closure verification (iter-32 reanchor)
verdict: Discrete divergence ||nabla_mu G^mu nu|| scales as N^(-1.85) on the 14-regime ladder with R^2 = 0.96; Symanzik-2 continuum asymptote 7e-04 is statistically zero. The second Bianchi identity nabla_mu G^mu nu = 0 is therefore recovered in the continuum limit on the relational Xi-graph; the framework's emergent Einstein equation is internally consistent with the geometric Bianchi constraint. Result already integrated in companion paper P4 (Section discrete-bianchi-recovered); reproducer this file plus parent corpus outputs/discrete_bianchi_scaling_audit.json.
